steps: Let p be the amount Tom saved. He earns £12 more, so total money = p + 12. The problem says he now has £30 altogether, so p + 12 = 30. Check each option: A) p + 30 = 12 gives p = -18, not correct. B) p - 12 = 30 gives p = 42, not correct. C) p + 12 = 30 gives p = 18, correct. D) 12 - p = 30 gives p = -18, not correct. E) p + 30 = 42 gives p = 12, not correct. Only option C matches the situation.
